page: Microsoft Azure F2alds_v7 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the Faldsv7 server family. Powered by dedicated AMD processors, this instance features 2 virtual central processing units (vCPUs) and 4.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core. The virtualization layer is managed by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server configuration includes 236 GB of local storage and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. It does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses. There are no integrated graphics processing units (GPUs) on this instance, making it reliant entirely on the AMD CPU for all processing tasks.

The F2alds_v7 is characterized by a low memory-to-vCPU ratio of 1:2, which represents a clear tradeoff prioritizing processing capacity over memory capacity. This hardware profile is designed for workloads that require dedicated CPU resources but have minimal memory footprints. Suitable workloads include lightweight web serving, basic batch processing, microservices, and small-scale computational tasks that fit within the 4.0 GB memory limit while utilizing the local 236 GB disk space.
description: Microsoft Azure F2alds_v7 is an x86_64 virtual machine within the Faldsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by AMD processors and 4.0 GB of system memory, yielding a low memory-to-CPU ratio of 2.0 GB per core. This instance is equipped with 236 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage, though it does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses or GPU accelerators. The hardware configuration represents a tradeoff that prioritizes dedicated compute resources over memory capacity, making it cost-efficient for workloads with low memory requirements. Appropriate applications for this server type include lightweight web servers, small-scale batch processing, microservices, and entry-level computational tasks that benefit from dedicated CPU allocation and local disk storage.

tagline: A dedicated dual-core AMD virtual machine featuring a low-memory profile and integrated local storage for compute-focused workloads.

4.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
236 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability

Optimized for low-memory compute tasks, microservices, and lightweight web serving
